metadata.source: kayros lera BPC exact solve (HiGHS backend, TL 600 s) — best solution found and validated by the reference checker; recorded as a solution, not as an optimality certificate (certification on stepwise arrival-time functions is withheld pending an exact value-jump labeling)

optimality.prover: kayros lera branch-price-and-cut (HiGHS backend; branch m5.9-exact-stepwise-labeling, commit 7f5f357)
optimality.certificate: Optimal under checker-exact route costs and standard LP/pricing tolerances. Certified by four independent solves (cold and warm starts x asymmetric and symmetric labeling modes) agreeing on the value, each with an audited exact-pricing phase and zero checker-infeasible priced columns.
optimality.arithmetic: checker-exact route costs (IEEE-754 doubles, canonical route order); the proven optimum equals compute_solution_cost of the stored routes bit-exactly
optimality.campaign: 2026-07-10 full TD re-certification on Grid'5000 (reservation 6763721 + retry 6765373)
